understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces, potentially by pushing blocks, so that a pushable object is moved onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' in the semantic grid, thereby achieving the WIN condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by one grid cell in the chosen direction, provided there was no blocking wall. If a pushable object (block) was adjacent in the movement direction, it could be pushed if the space behind it was empty. Walls could block movement in various ways and needed direct interaction to test passability. Switching control between selectable pieces was accomplished with a CLICK action using their exact pixel coordinates.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver selectable pieces, potentially by pushing blocks, so that a pushable object is moved onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' in the semantic grid, thereby achieving the WIN condition.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece by one grid cell in the chosen direction, provided there was no blocking wall. If a pushable object (block) was adjacent in the movement direction, it could be pushed if the space behind it was empty. Walls could block movement in various ways and needed direct interaction to test passability. Switching control between selectable pieces was accomplished with a CLICK action using their exact pixel coordinates.
